title: shuteria suffulta
intro: Shuteria suffulta is a plant species commonly known as the "Suffulta shrub" or "Indian clerodendrum," belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and skin issues due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Shuteria suffulta include reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and infections, and aiding in the management of fever and respiratory problems. Shuteria suffulta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
